signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
Kremlin Welcomes US-Israel-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Deal | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

The Kremlin publicly endorsed a two-week ceasefire agreement between the US, Israel, and Iran, announced on Wednesday (April 8, 2026), emphasizing de-escalation and a shift to diplomatic talks while supporting non-escalation[1]. signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.3-2.4% Consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

This data, released around April 2026, shows inflation rose due to oil prices but was contained by government measures like fuel caps and vouchers, with core inflation at 2.2% (down from 2.3%) and monthly CPI up 0.3% (below 0.6% expected)[1][2]. Bank of Korea li
